name: Brussels Sprouts in Mustard Sauce
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Brussels sprouts; frozen or fresh
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the Brussels sprouts in 1/2 cup of chicken broth; cover and set aside.
2. Spray a small skillet with vegetable cooking spray and add the oil. Saute the onion in the oil, then remove from heat and slowly add the remaining 1 cup of chicken broth.
3. Stir in the mustard and pepper. Return to heat and dissolve the cornstarch in the evaporated milk, then add to the skillet mixture. Cook, stirring constantly, until the sauce is smooth and thickened, about 5 minutes.
4. Pour the mustard sauce over the cooked Brussels sprouts and stir to coat. Serve immediately.
